summary: Export CSV/XLSX functionality fully tested for Replay Engine and Trade Journal. All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend export buttons verified in both Fill Monitor and Replay Dashboard.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=csv - returns CSV with header and trades (Content-Type: text/csv)
✅ Backend: GET /api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=xlsx - returns XLSX with 3 sheets (Trades, Metrics, Config) (Content-Type: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/export?format=csv - returns CSV with all journal positions
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/export?format=xlsx - returns XLSX with Journal sheet
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/export?format=csv&symbol=MNQ - symbol filter works correctly
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/export?format=xlsx&status=CLOSED - status filter works correctly
✅ Backend: GET /api/replay/runs - returns list of runs available for export
✅ Backend: GET /api/fills/journal - returns positions available for export
✅ Frontend Fill Monitor: CSV export button visible with correct href (/api/fills/export?format=csv&days=30)
✅ Frontend Fill Monitor: Excel export button visible with correct href (/api/fills/export?format=xlsx&days=30)
✅ Frontend Replay: Export buttons not visible initially (expected - need to load a result)
✅ Frontend Replay: CSV export button visible after loading run with correct href (/api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=csv)
✅ Frontend Replay: Excel export button visible after loading run with correct href (/api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=xlsx)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend replay.py export_run() at line 168-241: Correctly implements CSV/XLSX export with StreamingResponse
Backend fills.py export_journal() at line 105-186: Correctly implements CSV/XLSX export with filters
Frontend ReplayDashboard.jsx lines 1502-1512: Export buttons in run-context-banner with correct data-testid
Frontend FillMonitor.jsx lines 307-320: Export buttons in header with correct data-testid
Both exports use <a> tags with download attribute pointing to correct API endpoints
XLSX uses pandas ExcelWriter with openpyxl engine
CSV uses csv.DictWriter with proper headers
Content-Disposition headers correctly set for both formats

test_credentials.note: Session was recreated during testing (had expired)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing replay runs and journal positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export CSV/XLSX functionality fully implemented and tested. Key components: (1) Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/replay.py - export_run() at line 168. (2) Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/fills.py - export_journal() at line 105. (3) Frontend ReplayDashboard.jsx - export buttons at lines 1502-1512 (only visible when result loaded). (4) Frontend FillMonitor.jsx - export buttons at lines 307-320 (always visible in header). (5) Test file created: /app/backend/tests/test_export_endpoints.py with 9 tests.

feature_verification.GET /api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=c: Working - returns CSV with trades data
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/export/{run_id}?format=x: Working - returns XLSX with 3 sheets (Trades, Metrics, Config)
feature_verification.GET /api/fills/export?format=csv: Working - returns CSV with journal positions
feature_verification.GET /api/fills/export?format=xlsx: Working - returns XLSX with Journal sheet
feature_verification.Frontend Replay export buttons: Working - visible in run-context-banner when result loaded
feature_verification.Frontend Journal export buttons: Working - visible in header, hrefs update with filters

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. Export endpoints are REAL and functional.
